summary: Frontend testing completed for Purchase Orders UI module. All 9 features verified working correctly - page loads, navigation, stats cards, modals (Auto-Reorder Settings & Create Order), empty state, search, and filters (Status & Type).
passed_tests: Purchase Orders page loads correctly at /purchase-orders with data-testid='purchase-orders-page'
Navigation to Purchase Orders from sidebar using data-testid='nav-purchase-orders' works
Stats cards display correctly: Total Orders (0), Drafts (0), Pending (0), Approved (0), Auto-Generated (0)
Auto-Reorder Settings modal opens via data-testid='auto-reorder-settings-btn' - shows enable toggle, multiplier dropdown, notify toggle
Create New Order modal opens via data-testid='create-po-btn' - shows supplier selection, delivery store, add items, notes fields
Empty state shows correctly with 'No purchase orders found' message and 'Create First Order' button
Status filter dropdown via data-testid='status-filter' shows options: All Status, Draft, Pending, Approved, Received, Cancelled
Type filter dropdown via data-testid='type-filter' shows options: All Types, Auto-Generated, Manual
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing
GOOD: Page uses proper loading and empty states
GOOD: Modal dialogs properly implement supplier/item selection using shadcn Select components
GOOD: Auto-reorder settings properly syncs with backend /api/settings/auto-reorder endpoint
GOOD: Stats are calculated from orders array in real-time
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Orders UI module fully tested and working. All modals, filters, and navigation verified. Page loads at /purchase-orders route. Supplier 'Test Supplier ABC' is available in the system for creating purchase orders.

features_verified.page_load: Purchase Orders page loads correctly with proper header, stats, and empty state

auto_reorder_settings_modal.enable_toggle: Present with description 'Automatically create purchase orders when stock is low'
auto_reorder_settings_modal.buttons: Cancel and Save Settings buttons present

create_order_modal.buttons: Cancel and Create Order buttons present

features_verified.empty_state: Shows 'No purchase orders found' with Package icon and 'Create First Order' button
features_verified.search: Search input with 'Search orders...' placeholder works correctly
features_verified.status_filter: Dropdown with options: All Status, Draft, Pending, Approved, Received, Cancelled
features_verified.type_filter: Dropdown with options: All Types, Auto-Generated, Manual
